1._value: Near the ship The Victoria in #m10000000#, I met a heavily bearded crewmember named #p102#. He does have some #b#t4031009##k, but says that in order to use it properly, he needs a #b#t4031011##k. He promised that if I bring it to him, he’ll gladly hand it over. To obtain the #b#t4031011##k, I should head to #m10004002# and speak with #b#p510##k, the daughter of the inn’s owner.

2._value: I met #p510#. To make the #t4031011#, she said she needs #b#t4031010##k.

0._value: Well, I do happen to have some #b#t4031009##k, but I can’t just give it to you for free. You see, I’ve tried using this potion several times, but I realized it doesn’t work properly without an item called #b#t4031011##k. If you bring that to me, then I’d be more than willing to hand it over.

1._value: Want to know how to get that stone? I wouldn't be asking for your help if I knew! Here's the deal, head over to the general store in #b#m10004002##k, ask for the daughter of the owner, #b#p510##k, and ask her about its whereabouts. She may have a clue...

2._value: You know how to get to #m10004000#, don't you? Take the exit on the right from the harbor, go past #m10003000# up northwest, and then keep going east, and you'll find #m10004000#. Sorry, was that too obvious?

0._value: Oh, hello. How can I help you?
Didn't get the #b#t4031011##k yet? Oh well, it's not the easiest thing to acquire. Ah, so gorgeous when it shines like a star... Hurry and go see #b#p510##k at #b#m10004002##k.
